title: Crunchy Ramen with Miso Baked Cheese
description: A unique fusion of Japanese and Western flavors, this crunchy ramen dish combines the savory taste of miso with the melted goodness of baked cheese.
instructions: Cook ramen noodles according to package instructions.
In a saucepan, mix miso paste with ramen broth and heat until dissolved.
In a baking dish, place a layer of cooked noodles, followed by a layer of miso broth.
Top with bryndza cheese and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Bake in the oven for 10-12 minutes, or until cheese is melted and bubbly.
